---
title: "End‑to‑End Clinical Reporting Pipeline: Raw Data → SDTM → ADaM → TLF"
author:
  - name: "Fuxi Ma"
  - name: "Thomas Leung"
date: "2026-04-11"
format:
  pdf:
    keep-tex: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 5
    number-sections: true
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    geometry: "left=2cm,right=2cm,top=2cm,bottom=2cm"
    linestretch: 1.25
    fontsize: 11pt
    urlcolor: blue
    linkcolor: red
    include-before-body: 
      \thispagestyle{empty}
      \tableofcontents
      \clearpage
    header-includes:
      - \usepackage{titling}
      - \pretitle{\begin{center}\vspace*{2cm}\Huge}
      - \posttitle{\end{center}\clearpage}
      - \raggedbottom 
      - \usepackage{titling}
      - \pretitle{\begin{center}\vspace*{2cm}\Huge}
      - \posttitle{\end{center}\clearpage}
      - \raggedbottom
      - \widowpenalty=10000
      - \clubpenalty=10000
      - \brokenpenalty=10000
editor: visual
execute:
  cache: true
---

{{< pagebreak >}}

# Work Plan

**Parties:** Fuxi (pharmaverse/admiral/teal experience) & Thomas (R‑Shiny application)  
**Start Date:** Immediately after April's 3rd week, 2026 meeting  
**Objective:** Create a reproducible, interactive pipeline using `sdtm.oak` → `admiral` → `teal`, focusing on the DM/VS domain, ADSL, and a TLF dashboard.

---

## Phase 1: Alignment & Infrastructure (Week 1)

| Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|------|-------|--------------|
| 1.1 Review corrected `SDTM‑Datasets‑Creation‑with‑SDTM.OAK.pdf` | Both | Shared understanding of DM creation logic |
| 1.2 Review `ADaM‑Datasets‑Creation‑with‑Admiral.pdf` (ADSL) | Both | Agreed ADSL derivation steps (exposure, disposition, death, flags, codelists) |
| 1.3 Review `TLF‑R‑Shiny‑Dashboard‑with‑Teal.pdf` | Both | Confirm dashboard modules: DM table, AE table, KM plot |
| 1.4 Set up shared environment (Git repo, R package versions, data access) | Thomas | GitHub repo + `renv` lock file |
| 1.5 Identify raw data sources (CDISC SDTM test data, e.g., `pharmaversesdtm`) | Fuxi | Documented input datasets |

---

## Phase 2: SDTM Generation with `sdtm.oak` (Week 2)

| Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|------|-------|--------------|
| 2.1 Run the corrected DM domain script on sample raw data | Fuxi | Validated DM dataset (SDTM) |
| 2.2 Extend to other core domains (e.g., AE, EX, DS) if needed for ADaM | Fuxi | At least AE, EX, DS in SDTM format |
| 2.3 Write QC checks (e.g., no duplicate USUBJID, expected variables) | Fuxi | QC script |
| 2.4 Document any deviations from the corrected script | Fuxi | Markdown log |

---

## Phase 3: ADaM Creation with `admiral` (Weeks 3–4)

| Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|------|-------|--------------|
| 3.1 Re‑create ADSL following the PDF steps (exposure, disposition, death, flags, codelists) | Fuxi | ADSL dataset (one row per subject) |
| 3.2 Add derived variables: `RACEGR1`, `AGEGR1`, `REGION1`, `DTHCGR1`, numeric codes | Fuxi | Completed ADSL with all planned variables |
| 3.3 Generate ADSL metadata (xportr labels, formats) and write `.xpt` | Fuxi | `adsl.xpt` + metadata log |
| 3.4 (Optional) Create additional ADaM datasets (ADAE, ADTTE) for the dashboard | Both | `adae`, `adtte` (if not already present) |

---

## Phase 4: TLF Dashboard with `teal` (Weeks 5–6)

| Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|------|-------|--------------|
| 4.1 Adapt the provided `teal` code to use real ADSL/ADAE/ADTTE | Thomas | Running `teal` app locally |
| 4.2 Configure pre‑defined filters (`teal_slices`) as in PDF: `SAFFL`, `AESER`, `AERE1`, age, sex | Thomas | Filter panel with anchored slices |
| 4.3 Customize modules: demographic table, AE table, KM plot (add strata/facets) | Thomas | Fully functional dashboard |
| 4.4 Add a module to display SDTM/ADaM metadata (variable labels, source) | Thomas | “Data Dictionary” tab |

---

## Phase 5: Integration & End‑to‑End Testing (Week 7)

| Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|------|-------|--------------|
| 5.1 Chain the pipeline: raw data → SDTM → ADaM → teal dashboard | Both | Single R script or `targets` workflow |
| 5.2 Test with a second raw dataset (e.g., a different study) | Both | Validation report |
| 5.3 Performance check (loading speed, filter responsiveness) | Thomas | Benchmark summary |
| 5.4 Document known limitations (e.g., date imputation rules, missing value handling) | Fuxi | `README` + code comments |

---

## Phase 6: Final Delivery & Handover (Week 8)

| Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|------|-------|--------------|
| 6.1 Prepare a demo for stakeholders (recorded video or live) | Both | 15‑min demo |
| 6.2 Package pipeline as an R package or Shiny app bundle | Thomas | Deployable artifact (e.g., Docker image) |
| 6.3 Write user guide for analysts (how to add new study data) | Fuxi | PDF or RMarkdown guide |
| 6.4 Schedule follow‑up for next features (e.g., additional domains, safety tables) | Both | Roadmap document |

---

## Communication & Meetings

- **Weekly sync:** Every Friday, 1:30 PM PDT (30 min) – progress review, blockers, next steps.
- **Ad‑hoc:** As needed via email or shared chat (e.g., Slack).
- **File sharing:** GitHub repository + shared drive for raw data (if not public).

---

## Success Criteria

1. Raw data (SDTM‑like) → DM domain (SDTM) runs without error.
2. ADSL is created with all variables shown in the PDF, and passes basic CDISC conformance.
3. `teal` dashboard launches and displays the three modules with pre‑set filters.
4. A user can select a different raw dataset and re‑run the entire pipeline with minimal changes.

# Complete R Code
```{r}
#| eval: false
#| page-break: false

# Load required package
library(teal.modules.clinical)

ADSL <- teal.modules.clinical::tmc_ex_adsl
ADAE <- teal.modules.clinical::tmc_ex_adae
ADTTE <- teal.modules.clinical::tmc_ex_adtte

app <- init(
  data = cdisc_data(
    ADSL = ADSL, ADAE = ADAE, ADTTE = ADTTE,
    code = "
      ADSL <- teal.modules.clinical::tmc_ex_adsl
      ADAE <- teal.modules.clinical::tmc_ex_adae
      ADTTE <- teal.modules.clinical::tmc_ex_adtte
    "
  ),
  modules = modules(
    tm_t_summary(
      label = "Demographic Table",
      dataname = "ADSL",
      arm_var = choices_selected(
        choices = c("ARM", "ARMCD"), selected = "ARM"
      ),
      summarize_vars = choices_selected(
        choices = c("SEX", "RACE", "BMRKR2", "EOSDY", "DCSREAS", "AGE"),
        selected = c("SEX", "RACE")
      )
    ),
    tm_t_events(
      label = "AE Table",
      dataname = "ADAE",
      arm_var = choices_selected(
        choices = c("ARM", "ARMCD"), selected = "ARM"
      ),
      hlt = choices_selected(
        choices = variable_choices(ADAE, c("AEBODSYS", "AESOC")),
        selected = "AEBODSYS"
      ),
      llt = choices_selected(
        choices = variable_choices(ADAE, c("AETERM", "AEDECOD")),
        selected = "AEDECOD"
      )
    ),
    tm_g_km(
      label = "KM Plot",
      dataname = "ADTTE",
      arm_var = choices_selected(
        choices = c("ARM", "ARMCD", "ACTARMCD"),
        selected = "ARM"
      ),
      paramcd = choices_selected(
        choices = value_choices(ADTTE, "PARAMCD", "PARAM"),
        selected = "OS"
      ),
      strata_var = choices_selected(
        variable_choices(ADSL, c("SEX", "BMRKR2")), NULL
      ),
      facet_var = choices_selected(
        variable_choices(ADSL, c("SEX", "BMRKR2")), NULL
      ),
      plot_height = c(600L, 400L, 5000L)
    )
  ),
  header = tags$h1("Clinical Trial R-Shiny App"),
  footer = tags$div(
    style = "text-align: center; margin-top: 20px;
             padding: 10px; background-color: #f5f5f5;
             font-size: 12px;",
    "Fuxi Ma", "Built with Pharmaverse teal package"
  ),
  filter = teal_slices(
    teal_slice("ADSL", "SAFFL", id = "saffl",
               selected = "Y", fixed = TRUE, anchored = TRUE),
    teal_slice("ADAE", "AESER", anchored = TRUE),
    teal_slice("ADAE", id = "aerel",
               expr = "AEREL == 'Y' & AETOXGR %in% c('3', '4', '5')",
               title = "Grade 3+ Related Events"),
    teal_slice("ADSL", "SEX", id = "sex", fixed = TRUE),
    teal_slice("ADSL", id = "age",
               expr = "AGE >= 18 & AGE <= 30", title = "Young Adult"),
    module_specific = TRUE,
    mapping = list(
      "Demographic Table" = c("saffl"),
      "AE Table" = c("saffl", "aerel"),
      global_filters = c("sex", "age")
    ),
    count_type = "all"
  )
)

shinyApp(app$ui, app$server)


```

# Dashboard Snapshorts

## DM Table
```{r, echo=FALSE, out.width='100%'}
knitr::include_graphics("dm.png")
```

## AE Table

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.pos='h!', out.width='100%'}
knitr::include_graphics("AE.png")
```

## Kaplan-Meier Plot

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.pos='h!', out.width='100%'}
knitr::include_graphics('km_plot.png')
```
